description: A queryable Family Medicine board exam knowledge base (1,640 ITE + 1,221 AAFP questions, 2018–2025) linked to a clinical guideline library (2,206 articles, 1,571 PDFs) via a structured SQLite pipeline.
baton_description: Tier 2 walk-down + corpus-wide question-text and subscript-orphan cleanup. 8 distinct DB-write workflows applied (all backed up, all BATON 075 invariants preserved): (1) A3 choices_empty re-extraction for 42 QIDs (27 OK 5-of-5 + 15 PARTIAL_4OF5 — ABFM source-PDF defect missing choice E; correct_letter in {A,B,C,D} for all 15); (2) A2 truncation-candidate re-extraction → all 23 ALREADY_FULL (heuristic false-positives); (3) QID-2024-0067 enrichment backfill (TF-IDF keywords + concept_tags via Sonnet 4.6, ~$0.01); (4) blueprint+body_system verified via precedent; (5) 8th UMBRELLA review (+1 net is genuine signal — 2 promotions + 1 demotion); (6) question_text contamination cleanup for 42 QIDs (embedded answer-choice block + trailing empty slots + Item #NN residue) + 2 specific choice fixes; (7) wandering-subscript orphan corpus-wide cleanup via fix_subscript_orphans.py — 206 questions, 239 orphan lines removed, 176 medical-knowledge subscript recoveries via 14 rules (A1c/B12/FEV1/T4/H2-blocker/α1-/H2O/S3 gallop/HCO3/PaO2/PaCO2/Lp-PLA2/phospholipase A2). Final corpus state: 0 questions with empty choices (was 42), 0 with empty correct_text (was 42), 0 with embedded-choice-block in stem (was 41), 0 with subscript orphan in question_text (was 47), 0 with subscript orphan in explanation (was 117). 4 deferred flags CLOSED (QID-2024-0067-ENRICHMENT, LAYER-B-UMBRELLA-PROMOTION, A3-SOURCE-PDF-MISSING-E, SUBSCRIPT-ORPHAN-CORPUS); 2 NEW (LAYER-A2-HEURISTIC-TUNING, CORPUS-QC-LAYER-A7-A8). 5 new M2 scripts.
